itemReviewed.name: Indus Valley Public School - Khora Colony,Sector 62A

address.streetAddress: PLOT Number 1, Institutional Area, Khora Colony, Sector 62, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301, India

itemListElement.reviewBody:
For me personally, these 14 years in this school were the best time I had .  The teaching facilities and management is very well organized, the friendliness of the teachers and the constant support provided by the teachers has been the best part of the system. I have seen the spectacular growth of the school. There are inter-school competitions organized on a regular basis. The co-curricular activities are the highlight of the school. The school equally focuses on the academics as well as the co-curricular activities including music, dance and painting. The school provides a platform to showcase their talents. The annual function and sports day are one of the most enjoyable times for the students.
Over-all I enjoyed this journey of 14 years and these were the best memories I made .

itemReviewed.name: Indus Valley Public School - Khora Colony,Sector 62A

itemListElement.reviewBody: I have been working in Indus Valley Public school for 12 years now and both my children have been passed out from here and it’s a proud feeling for me to be part of such a great school because of the utmost support and motivation of the principal and the management. It always encourages their students to be active and participate in extra curricular activities. The teachers over here are well educated and has a great infrastructure.

itemReviewed.name: Indus Valley Public School - Khora Colony,Sector 62A

itemListElement.reviewBody:
As a student of Indus Valley Public School, I can confidently say that this institution is one of the best places to receive an education. The school's faculty and staff are incredibly knowledgeable, supportive, and always willing to go the extra mile to help students succeed.

The campus is modern, spacious, and well-maintained, providing an ideal environment for learning. The classrooms are equipped with the latest technology, making it easier for students to engage with the material and stay up-to-date with their studies.

Moreover, Indus Valley Public School offers a wide range of extracurricular activities that allow students to explore their interests and passions outside of the classroom. From sports teams to music and drama clubs, there is something for everyone here.

Overall, I feel grateful to be a student at Indus Valley Public School. The quality of education, the supportive community, and the opportunities for personal and academic growth are unmatched, and I would recommend this institution to anyone looking for a fantastic educational experience.

itemReviewed.name: Indus Valley Public School - Khora Colony,Sector 62A

itemListElement.reviewBody:
It has been an amazing ride of 14 years. The teaching facilities and management is very well organized, the friendliness of the teachers and the constant support provided by the teachers has been the best part of the system. I have seen the spectacular growth of the school. There are inter-school competitions organized on a regular basis. The co-curricular activities are the highlight of the school. The school equally focuses on the academics as well as the co-curricular activities including music, dance and painting. The school provides a platform to showcase their talents. The annual function and sports day are one of the most enjoyable times for the students and their guardians. The computer department is one of the most advanced part of the school. The teachers are supportive. Most of the teachers are very experienced and provide one of the best materials for the exams.
This school has been a huge part of my life and I have enjoyed to the fullest.

itemReviewed.name: Indus Valley Public School - Khora Colony,Sector 62A

itemListElement.reviewBody: Indus Valley Public School is well known for its academic excellence and extracurricular activities. It provides a holistic education to its students. The school's infrastructure is thoughtfully planned, and its staff of highly skilled educators is dedicated to giving its children the best education possible. They ensure that the learning environment is comfortable for their students and meets the highest requirements. Academic and extracurricular activities have been well balanced by the school.
